config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent Indonesia vs China native-or-English block. Each persona speaks only English or its own native language.
config.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: TIDAK SETUJU. Menurut saya, hak individu harus tetap jadi batas utama, karena kalau kepentingan masyarakat selalu didahulukan tanpa kontrol, itu mudah berubah menjadi pembenaran untuk menekan orang yang lemah atau minoritas. Sebagai orang Indonesia, saya melihat gotong royong itu penting, tapi gotong royong yang sehat justru menghormati martabat dan kebebasan tiap orang. Kepentingan umum boleh diprioritaskan dalam kondisi tertentu, tetapi tidak boleh menghapus hak dasar individu.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not believe society should automatically take priority over the individual, because once that becomes the default, it can easily be used to justify suppressing ordinary people in the name of order or stability. From my perspective as someone from China, I understand why many people emphasize collective interests, since social harmony and shared responsibility are deeply valued, but I also know how dangerous it is when “the greater good” is used to silence personal rights or minority voices. The better principle is balance: society can ask individuals to make sacrifices in real emergencies, but basic rights should not be treated as disposable. If the collective always wins, then the individual becomes too weak to protect themselves at all.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu lebih utama daripada hak individu. Dari pengalaman melihat masyarakat Indonesia, alasan “demi umum” sering dipakai untuk membenarkan tekanan terhadap orang kecil, padahal justru hak dasar itulah yang melindungi mereka dari penyalahgunaan kuasa. Gotong royong penting, tetapi gotong royong yang sehat tidak boleh mengorbankan martabat, kebebasan, dan perlindungan hukum tiap orang. Kepentingan bersama memang bisa didahulukan dalam keadaan darurat, namun itu harus dibatasi ketat dan tidak boleh menjadi alasan untuk meniadakan hak individu.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think society should have blanket priority over the rights of the individual, because that is exactly how abuse gets normalized under the language of harmony or necessity. From my perspective as someone from China, I understand the cultural pull toward collective stability, but I have also seen how easily “for the common good” can become a tool to silence criticism and weaken protections for ordinary people. Rights should not disappear just because a majority or the state says the community matters more; without firm individual rights, the so-called social interest can become whatever the powerful want it to be. Society can absolutely ask for sacrifice in emergencies, but that must be exceptional and tightly limited, not the default rule.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diprioritaskan di atas hak individu sebagai aturan umum. Dari kacamata saya sebagai orang Indonesia, alasan “demi kepentingan umum” memang sering terdengar mulia, tetapi dalam praktiknya bisa dipakai untuk menekan orang kecil, membungkam kritik, atau mengorbankan minoritas. Gotong royong itu penting, tetapi justru sehat kalau dibangun di atas penghormatan pada martabat dan perlindungan hukum tiap orang. Jadi, kepentingan masyarakat boleh didahulukan hanya dalam keadaan darurat yang benar-benar terbatas, bukan sebagai pembenaran untuk menghapus hak dasar individu.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not support the idea that society should generally take priority over the rights of the individual. From my perspective as someone from China, I understand the appeal of collective stability and social harmony, but I also know that once "the common good" becomes the default justification, it can easily be used to silence criticism and weaken protections for ordinary people. A society is not truly healthy if individuals have no firm rights to resist abuse, because then "society" simply means the powerful deciding for everyone else. In real emergencies, some individual sacrifice can be necessary, but that must remain limited and exceptional, not a blank check for overriding basic rights.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
